hu0j56jcn8i47fimd8dsftsduk.summary: You transitioned the P&C claims process observability strategy from ServiceNow to Celonis—relying on Celonis's successful proof of concept to drive the change. The claims business faces a strict three-month mandate to mine their processes in Celonis—leveraging streaming data from Kafka and Snowflake for the new Business Process Owner Workbench. You must deliver an urgent architecture position paper to Suresh—detailing this workbench framework and addressing integration challenges with legacy systems.
tasks: Draft the architecture position paper for Suresh—defining the technical framework and components for the Business Process Owner Workbench.
Establish the implementation timeline with Calvin's team—ensuring the claims business meets its three-month process mining deadline.
Define a remediation plan for legacy platforms—specifically Legacy Auto—that do not currently emit the Kafka events required for real-time monitoring.
Align with Tiffany Ryan, Faith Remley, and Suresh—clarifying the definitions and integration paths for Skan.ai desktop telemetry and risk controls.
hu0j56jcn8i47fimd8dsftsduk.title: Sync on Process health scorecard

eaq39r4e3arco1fvectuudpgdc.summary: Your March 25 meeting with Aaron focused on opposing the costly Ernix migration—estimated at $20M–$25M—until foundational data modeling issues in Snowflake are resolved. You also evaluated the Project 002 initiative—specifically the complex Guidewire-to-Paz reverse data flow for renewals—and discussed AI-enabled development velocity. No work notes were found for your last meeting with Dan—you must coordinate with him directly to bridge his recent updates with Aaron's strategic priorities.
tasks: Reiterate the architectural stance against the Ernix migration—maintain focus on resolving the Snowflake data issues first.
Flag the Guidewire-to-Paz reverse data flow complexity—demand a status update on data translation challenges for renewal processing.
Confirm Dan's latest project status—retrieve his recent meeting outcomes directly to align shared operational goals before speaking with Aaron.
Track the progress of AI-enabled development initiatives—evaluate if agentic automation tools have begun accelerating delivery timelines.
eaq39r4e3arco1fvectuudpgdc.title: Monthly 1:1 w/Aaron Bend

52mmtqegtrvropgerjhs3j153o.summary: Review your key operational shifts from the past week—specifically the newly mandated "Go TPDT" procurement governance framework and the $15 million CMT Telematics POC on AWS. Balance these delivery tracks with the core directives from the June 24 EA SLT—completing mid-year reviews immediately and streamlining meeting attendance via the new decision-making infographics. Track the ongoing Underwriting and Claims evolutions—including the critical Celonis integration and the delayed HiMarley texting security clearances.
tasks: Submit your pending mid-year performance reviews immediately to meet today's deadline from the EA SLT.
Update the procurement engagement wiki FAQ to clarify what must occur before an architect can approve a purchase plan.
Analyze the CMT vector embedding data to validate its actual risk-prediction value before committing to the $15 million platform spend.
Resolve the outstanding PII and NPI compliance hurdles blocking the HiMarley two-way texting integration.
52mmtqegtrvropgerjhs3j153o.title: Weekly Staff – P&C CTO Leadership
